name: Swing Lab Performance Golf
about: Swing Lab Performance Golf is an indoor golf simulator and training facility located in Lakeville, MN. Utilizing top-of-the-line technology, including TrackMan 4 launch monitors and Quintic video analysis, the facility offers a data-driven approach to improving one's game. It features private simulator suites for playing on over 300 global courses, comprehensive club fitting services, and specialized putting studio technology. The venue caters to golfers of all levels, from serious practice to casual play, with various lesson packages, junior programs, and monthly scramble tournaments.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan and Quintic technology for precise swing and ball data
Premium private simulator suites for a realistic and comfortable golf experience
Comprehensive club fitting services backed by launch monitor data
Indoor putting studio with Zen Green Stage for green reading and stroke analysis

food_and_drink.notes: Available during junior program pizza parties and likely general consumption
Available with 10% off food and alcohol during the monthly scramble tournament

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor using radar and optics for data used by over 1,000 tour players

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the facility also provides club rentals and has a full pro shop for purchases or fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not explicitly stated, but the venue offers food and alcohol, suggesting an on-premise option is available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the course and pace, but simulator time is typically booked in hourly blocks. The monthly scramble tournament is 3 hours for a round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Lab offers a 7-week junior golf lesson series and is designed to be a supportive, high-tech environment for young golfers.
